programme.title: Life in the shadow of Guatemala's Volcano of Fire
programme.desc: On 3 June, the Fuego volcano in Guatemala erupted, killing at least 113 people and leaving 332 missing. Thousands of victims have been displaced and are still living in temporary shelters. Questions are being asked about what the government's disaster prevention agency is doing to help victims. The Guardian journalist Iman Amrani found out how people were coping, and what lessons need to be learned from the disaster

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Black Sheep tells the story of Cornelius Walker, whose life changed on 27 November 2000 - the day Damilola Taylor was killed. Damilola was 10, the same age as Cornelius. He lived five minutes away. He had the same skin colour. Cornelius's mother, scared for her son's safety, moved their family out of London. Cornelius suddenly found himself living on a white estate run by racists. But rather than fight them, Cornelius decided to become more like the people who hated him.

programme.title: 'Revenge pornography': Chrissy Chambers' search for justice
programme.desc: In April, it became a crime in England and Wales to post ‘revenge pornography'. Chrissy Chambers and her girlfriend Bria are YouTube's most popular lesbian content creators. The two channels they run have almost half a million subscribers. But before Chrissy came out, she had a boyfriend. He also has videos of her. And she says he's using them to destroy her

programme.title: RIP SENI: racism, graffiti and the UK's mental health crisis
programme.desc: One morning in June 2020, graffiti reading RIP SENI appeared emblazoned across a public artwork outside the Bethlem royal hospital, a psychiatric hospital in south London. The spray-painted letters drew attention to Olaseni Lewis, a 23-year-old black man who died after being restrained by 11 police officers while in the care of the hospital in 2010. This film follows what happened after the graffiti, as it launches a discussion about race, mental health and injustice in the UK, and the effects on families.

programme.title: Share
programme.desc: Tim Chau is an 18-year-old Asian-American with more than 4m followers on Instagram. He lives online, grabbing his phone first thing in the morning and even taking baths with it sometimes. Although Tim usually shares funny memes, he occasionally posts about mental health. In exploring his reasons for these posts, we discover he has created a different persona online than in real life.

programme.title: Qandeel
programme.desc: The life, death and impact of Pakistan's working-class icon Qandeel Baloch, killed in 2016 after becoming a social media celebrity. This film tells Qandeel's story through her own videos and media appearances. A young, fearless woman who collided with Pakistan's mainstream media, Qandeel exposed the religious right and challenged middle-class morality.

programme.title: Teranga: the migrant-run Afrobeat nightclub uniting Naples
programme.desc: Fata and Yankuba are two young Gambians with ambitious dreams, who fled dictatorship and poverty and landed in Naples, only to discover a new kind of violence: a pernicious climate of racism and an unhelpful immigration system. Their only escape from the psychological torture of years spent waiting for documents in squalid camps is a small underground club in the heart of the city. The Teranga nightclub provides a rare safe space for migrants to meet young Italians.

programme.title: Justice for Adama: the family protesting against police brutality in France
programme.desc: Adama Traoré died in police custody last year. His family's struggle for justice has put police brutality back under the spotlight in France, and his older sister Assa is leading the battle to find out the truth about his death. Iman Amrani looks at how this story paved the way for the recent riots in France, following the alleged rape of a young man called Theo by a police officer. *The figure of 15 deaths in custody every year quoted in the film is based on campaign groups and media tallies. No official figures for deaths in custody are recorded in France.

programme.title: Is my neighbourhood poisoning me? Living in the shadow of a gasworks redevelopment
programme.desc: Since 2016 residents in Southall have questioned whether the gases released from the redevelopment of an old gasworks site could be damaging their health. We followed them for a year as they grow their campaign group, question the authorities and demand to know if the increased air pollution from the site could have put them at greater risk during the coronavirus pandemic

programme.title: Garth Nix answers your questions: on JRR Tolkien, gaming and pronouncing characters' names
programme.desc: In an ongoing series, Guardian Australia is getting kids and young adults to do the hard work instead of us – by interviewing their favourite authors. Here, the author of the Old Kingdom/Abhorsen, Seventh Tower and Keys to the Kingdom fantasy series opens up about queer representation, perfectionism and his writing tips.

programme.title: No ball games: life and play through the eyes of children across the UK
programme.desc: Celebrating the imagination and resourcefulness of young children across the UK by understanding the outdoor games they invent, inherit and play. The documentary was shot before Covid-19 changed their lives, and shifts from rural Wales to post-industrial Teesside and inner-city London. What challenges will these young people face in the aftermath of brutal funding cuts to youth services? How can their optimistic energy strengthen their resilience in these challenging times?

programme.title: Somalinimo
programme.desc: As students return to universities around the world, four British-Somali students talk about navigating one of Britain's most elite institutions: Cambridge University. Their identity is rooted in Somalinimo (‘the essence of being Somali') and in this love letter to Somali culture, blackness and Islam, they reflect on both belonging and marginalisation.

programme.title: Pretty radical: a young woman's journey into the heart of Poland's far right
programme.desc: We follow 19-year-old Paulina, who joins Poland's far-right National Radical Camp. She is quickly selected as a candidate in local elections because she's ‘a pretty young woman' who might improve the image of an organisation thought to be full of ‘bald hooligans vandalising the city'. What drew her to join the nationalist group in the first place? Will anything make her question her loyalty to them?

programme.title: Owen Jones meets ...: Owen Jones Meets
programme.desc: Owen Jones is a Guardian columnist and the author of Chavs: The Demonisation of the Working Class and The Establishment – And How They Get Away With It.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roast - Johnny fills in for Moira at the annual Mayor's Roast, as David distracts Moira from finding out that Stevie and Patrick have been taking private dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.title: Mad About You S1E2
programme.desc: Paul nervously anticipates an impromptu reunion with an old college flame and nobly invites a curious Jamie to accompany him and Selby. But he can't help competing with Selby for his ex-girlfriend's attention -- while Jamie discovers a secret about the former relationship that even Paul doesn't know.

programme.title: Mad About You S1E3
programme.desc: An apartment-bound Paul and Jamie want to make the most of their Sunday in Manhattan and finally agree to a strict precise agenda. programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America
programme.desc: In this penultimate episode, the oven mitts come off and the celebrities fight for a spot in the finale. First up is remote control chef, where the celebrities must tell their mentors how to cook a dish. After that, they face their toughest challenge yet, which is the Worst Cooks version of Iron Chef called Aluminum Foil Chef! The celebrities with the best dishes will head to the finale.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America
programme.desc: The final two recruits face their final, ultimate challenge – cook a restaurant quality meal for a panel of culinary experts. However before the celebrities impress the panel of culinary experts, they must first impress their biggest fans. Anne and Tyler coach their recruits, but all the skills the celebs have learned over the past 6 weeks are put to the test. One recruit is named the winner and awarded $25,000 for their charity.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America
programme.desc: Fourteen of the worst cooks in America enter boot camp with dreams of putting their kitchen nightmares behind them. Chefs Anne Burrell and Robert Irvine want to see what they're dealing with, so they ask the recruits to make their signature dishes and the results are truly disastrous! After being sorted into teams, the recruits dive right into the deep end of the kitchen by learning to make a surf and turf dish. The recruits on each team with the worst dishes are sent home.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode one, Lap of Luxury will explore three of New Zealand's finest lodges & experiences including classic elegance in the Waikato at Huka Lodge, architectural majesty on Waiheke Island at Mawhiti and resplendence on the water with Rua Moana. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties and experiences.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode two, Lap of Luxury indulges in serenity and majesty near Wanaka at the beautiful Mahu Whenua, visits the stunning retreats, Rahimoana and First Light where luxury treads lightly in Northland and farming meets conservation at Bullo River Station in Australia's Northern Territory. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode three, Lap of Luxury treats us to some lakeside splendour at Matakauri Lodge in Queenstown. Striking design meets golf on Lake Taupō at the impressive Kinloch Manor and in the East Kimberley of Australia, we visit El Questro, a sumptuous sanctuary resting on 700,000 acres of natural splendour. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode four, Lap of Luxury heads to Kaikōura to take in the multitude of experiences on offer at Matai Peak Lodge. Then head to the Bay of Islands for a cruise on board the magnificent luxury boat Ata Rangi, before heading to King Island in Tasmania to experience the elegance of the remote Kittawa Lodge. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties and experiences.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: In episode five, Lap of Luxury experiences history and culture on Lake Tarawera at the truly connected Solitaire Lodge. Become a part of the family-run bliss near Mangawhai, that is Te Arai Lodge. Then head over the Tasman to Orpheus Island Lodge, a tropical escape on the Great Barrier Reef. Step inside the Lap of Luxury and meet the wonderful and passionate people who are the heart and soul of these exquisite properties.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E21
programme.desc: Darrin's agency is unable to find a model for the "Jewel of the East" campaign. Darrin hopes they'll be able to do so, if only to bolster the confidence of Wally Ames, who is sub-stituting for the company's top photographer. Samantha trans-forms the Stephens' cat into a beautiful Oriental girl named Ling Ling. Everyone flips over her and the campaign is wrapped up. Darrin invites Larry and Louise Tate and Wally to a victory celebration at his home. Wally, intrigued by Ling Ling's feline grace, brings her along. Samantha's efforts to make Ling Ling give up Wally fail. To avoid a catastrophe, Samantha is forced to tell Darrin and asks him to warn Wally off, but Wally only becomes angry with Darrin. Samantha spikes Ling Ling's drink with truth serum. Wally bows out when Ling Ling displays her true cat nature. Later, Gladys Kravitz calls her husband when she sees Ling Ling clad in a mink coat, lapping milk from a saucer. By the time Abner gets to the window, Samantha has returned Ling Ling to her original state, and Abner gives his wife a spoonful of her nerve medicine.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E22
programme.desc: Endora, hoping to break up her daughter's marriage, superimposes Samantha's face on a print entitled "Maid of Salem:" the print is dated 1690. Darrin buys the print and then begins to worry about the difference between Samantha's age and his own. With Endora planting seeds of doubt at every turn, Darrin visualizes himself as a doddering old man, while Samantha retains her youthful appearance. Everyone, including Larry Tate and the doctor from whom Darrin seeks advice, fails to realize what is troubling him. Then, in a nearby park, Darrin overhears two squirrels to which Endora has given voice talk about their dif-ferences in age. Endora finally admits to Samantha that she can age along with Darrin. Samantha, after telling Darrin she never posed for the picture, tells him that her mother is to blame for their problem. She assures him that they will grow old together, but being in love will never note the difference. As insurance, Samantha uses witchcraft to make the "Maid of Salem" disappear.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E23
programme.desc: The lack of a traffic signal at busy Morning Glory Circle makes it virtually impossible for the Stephens or their neighbors to cross without risking life and limb. Joe Harvey calls a meeting at his home to discuss plans for doing something about it. Darrin makes an ad for a mass rally at the school auditorium to force City Hall to put a traffic light on the corner. However, Samantha has trouble getting Endora to return the traffic signals she has collected. Endora even brings a London bobby to the Stephens' living room. The bobby, of course, has disappeared by the time Gladys Kravitz brings her husband to see him. At the rally, the Mayor tells his constituents a traffic light is unnecessary. However, using her witchcraft, Samantha has the Mayor and his limousine so tied up in a traffic jam that he is convinced a traffic signal is necessary. Endora, as a final touch, brings a modern traffic signal to the Stephens home for the victory celebration. Gladys sees it, but by the time she brings Abner, Samantha makes Endora cause it to vanish.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E24
programme.desc: Samantha tells Endora she doesn't have time for a dress-fitting. Endora solves Samantha's problem by transforming herself into En-Sam, identical to Samantha. Bob Frazer, an author, falls for En-Sam and they do the town together. Meanwhile, Darrin tells Samantha to expect a visit from his friend, Bob Frazer. Gladys Kravitz, who has seen En-Sam with Bob, is sure the Stephens home is about to break up. After Bob sees Samantha and mistakes her for En-Sam, Samantha explains to Endora the trouble she is causing. Endora is convinced when she learns Bob is expected at the Stephens home. All of En-Sam's efforts to break with Bob fail. Bob is determined to have a showdown with Darrin over Samantha. Samantha tells Darrin that Bob has fallen in love with Endora. Endora, still En-Sam, arrives and Bob thinks En-Sam and Samantha are identical twins. Although Endora promises to give Bob Up, Samantha, knowing her mother, is not sure what she will do.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E25
programme.desc: Samantha and Gladys Kravitz become aware of their husbands' interest in Priscilla "Pleasure" O'Riley, a beautiful model, when she buys a house next door. Pleasure is hiding from Thor "Thunderbolt" Swenson, an offensive fullback who has threatened mayhem if he sees her with another man. Darrin becomes involved in Pleasure's affairs after he helps her move in. One night, Pleasure wakes up the Stephens. Telling them that Thunderbolt has learned her new address, she pleads for Darrin's protection. Thunderbolt arrives and Samantha inadvertently gives him the impression that Darrin is Pleasure's new boyfriend. Darrin is saved from Thunderbolt's wrath when Samantha turns him into the image of his grandmother. Then, certain that Abner is the man, Thunderbolt knocks him out and is arrested. Gladys hits the headlines when the newspapers mistakenly single her out as the object of Thunderbolt's jealousy. Pleasure's lawyer gets a court order to keep Thunderbolt away. However, Pleasure accepts Thunderbolt's offer to drive her to the Mayor's office where she is to pose as "Miss Urban Renewal."

programme.title: Bewitched S1E26
programme.sub-title: Driving Is The Only Way To Fly
programme.desc: After a violent argument while he is teaching her to drive, Darrin enrolls Samantha in a driving school. Basil Koenig assigns his brother-in-law Harold, one of humanity's leading nervous wrecks, to teach Samantha. Time after time, Samantha uses witchcraft to get the dual-controlled car out of catastrophic predicaments. Harold finally breaks when he hears Endora's voice from the back seat and is unable to see her. Harold leaves Samantha, Endora, and the car and heads for a psychiatrist. Feeling responsible, Samantha takes Darrin to the school to keep Harold from losing his job. Matters get more complicated when Darrin tries to explain Endora's unseen presence. Although Koenig has already fired Harold, he rehires him when Samantha threatens to go to another driving school. After Darrin learns Samantha has cured Harold's nervousness by getting him to join a class in basket weaving, Darrin decides to join, too.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E27
programme.sub-title: There's No Witch Like An Old Witch
programme.desc: Age has played havoc with Aunt Clara's witchcraft. Unable to fly great distances any longer, she is forced to give up a trip to Miami with the other witches. Samantha invites her to stay at the Stephens' home while they are away. All of Aunt Clara's efforts to help around the house prove disastrous. To cheer her up, Samantha and Darrin take her along for an evening on the town with the Caldwells. However, when the babysitter does not arrive, Aunt Clara insists on substituting. Aunt Clara's magic tricks delight Jimmy Caldwell, age six, so much that other families clamor for her services. However Agnes Bain complains when she learns that Aunt Clara has told the children she is a witch and they believe her. Aunt Clara receives a court order restraining her from further babysitting until she reports to Judge Virgil Winner for a hearing. Winner is so impressed by Aunt Clara that he asks her to babysit with his son. Aunt Clara's booming business is cut short, however, when the Stephens send her to Florida by train to join her friends.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E28
programme.desc: Inspired by a demonstration of an electric garage door, Samantha opens her garage by twitching her nose. Plagued by Gladys about this, Abner questions Darrin. To cover up, Darrin foregoes new fishing gear and buys a remote control for the garage. When radio signals from passing planes operate the door at random, Samantha asks Darrin to return the device and use the money for fishing gear. Darrin refuses to believe Samantha and she swears never to use magic again. Later, Samantha and Darrin are trapped when a plane signal docks the garage. While Samantha stands by her vow, refusing Darrin's request to open the door, a plane flies overhead. Darrin and Samantha quarrel when he accuses her of using magic again, but when the door flies open, Gladys and Abner see Samantha and Darrin embracing. Although Darrin is finally convinced, he has trouble explaining matters to the Kravitzes. Abner and Gladys buy a remote control, too. While demonstrating it, Gladys plows right through her garage door.

programme.title: Bewitched S1E29
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz catches Samantha twitching her nose to rearrange pictures on a wall. To keep Gladys from spreading the news, Samantha convinces her that she has extrasensory perception. Gladys starts using her supposed powers on Abner. Everything goes wrong, especially when she tries to make the rain stop. Samantha tells Gladys that supernatural powers can come and go and that Gladys' have probably gone forever. Later, when Gladys makes a scene in a supermarket, claiming the place is in grave danger, Samantha proposes a séance, hoping to scare the daylights out of Gladys. During the séance, Samantha produces an apparition which looks like a relative of Gladys', and Abner becomes frightened. Gladys tells her husband to "dry up" and Samantha changes him into a pile of ashes. When Samantha directs Gladys to swear off magic forever to get Abner back, she does so. Later, Gladys gets the same idea as Abner about going to a movie, and feels that possibly she still has the power.

programme.desc: Moving the leadwood tree is proving to be nerve wracking for Amanda. Back at the building site, the thatch is too heavy for the wooden frames and as a result its bending the door frames. Amanda's kids are in Zimbabwe for the school holidays.

programme.desc: Bruce visits Victoria Falls Safari Lodge, to check out the competition and what is on their menu. The Lodge chef shows him how to make their signature Mopane worm dish. At the house, they have a new unwanted visitor, a Mozambican Spitting Cobra.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.sub-title: Right As Rain" Right As Rain

programme.title: Aerial Mountains: South Korea

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura experience Nature's fury through storm amazing generating gear that simulates terrible hurricanes, ice cold winds and even tornados. For these experiments they'll use remarkable technology that creates massive storms on Hollywood sets.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Laura and Nick explore the techniques to deal with these apex predators when they are the most dangerous. We'll scientifically breakdown the behaviors, strength, eyesight and speed of mountain lions through outrageous experiments, in day and night.

programme.title: Survival Science
programme.desc: Nick and Laura head deep into the mountains to explore survival techniques that go far beyond anything they've learned before. Our courageous hosts subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: While solo climbing Mt. Goddard, a remote peak in the California Sierra, Gregg Hein's leg is crushed by a boulder and he's sent careening down the mountain. Barely able to stop his fall, he's now faced with a horrific compound fracture.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: After his leg is crushed by a boulder, Gregg Hein is stranded on a high Sierra peak with an infected compound fracture. Knowing he won't be reported missing for days, Gregg attempts to crawl off the mountain and rescue himself.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: On deployment in Anbar Province, Marine Corp Master Sergeant Buck Doyle throws himself in harm's way to save a fallen comrade from an Iraqi sniper and becomes a target himself. This is a story of survival on and off the battlefield.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne's incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he's met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Chris and Casey are introduced to the tastes of the New Zealand wild, and get a rude awakening. Mother Nature's mind games start to mess with the brothers' mental strength, while their inflatable raft continues to be a serious problem.

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Chris and Casey disagree on what their next course of action should be. Without clear cache directions, the brothers are left with a hard choice. Should they stay, or should they go?

programme.title: Dropped
programme.desc: Chris and Casey hike the mountainside, but the steep slopes and shifting shale make the trek anything but easy. The brothers face energy depletion and exhaustion, and they feel the pressure to find new food sources soon, or go hungry.

programme.title: Backpack Nazereth, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina is in the ancient city of Tiberias, known for its natural hot springs, where she visits the Sea of Galilee. She later visits the Basilica of Annunciation in Nazereth and Via Dolorosa in Jerusalem.

programme.title: City Breaks Barcelona
programme.desc: From Antoni Gaudi's whims to hosting the 1992 Olympics, Alex finds out that Barcelona has been shaped by many different things.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
programme.desc: Rohan visits Ho Chi Minh where he tries local delicacies, explores the Saigon Post Office, Reunification Palace and Pagoda and learns about the Cu chi tunnels.

programme.title: Great World Hotels Amansara 2
programme.desc: Sukhmani is on a break in Cambodia, where she gets to stay at a resort, which used to be the royal guest house.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Hanoi, Vietnam
programme.desc: In Hanoi, Rohan relishes local delicacies like Pho and Bun Cha. Post which, he visits historic sights, rides a Cyclo, enjoys a water puppet show, explores the Old Quarter and refreshed himself with a glass of beer at Beer Corner.

programme.title: Backpack Jerusalem, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learns about its significance and ends her day with exploring Cardo market, Mahane Yehuda Markets and having a traditional delicacy, Shamburak.

programme.title: Xp Guide Male, Maldives
programme.desc: Kim Jagtiani visits the pint-sized Maldivian capital, Malé, and finds out that its bustle is in stark contrast to the secluded luxury of the island resorts for which the archipelago is known. She goes on a tour to see some of the iconic attractions of Malé such as the Islamic centre, the President's house and the National Museum, which houses ancient artefacts and royal antiquities. Along the way, the rich history and culture of the Maldives, often overlooked by tourists, unfolds before her.

programme.title: World Heritage Pattadakal, India
programme.desc: Explore the temples of Pattadakal that were then, an example of growing royal influence of the rulers of the 7th century. And listen to the tales of these monuments built by Kings of southern India. Later, travel to the eastern coast of India to Konark, where stands in glory a temple dedicated to the Sun God.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Quebec, Canada
programme.desc: From the famous deer meat pie of Aux Ancies Canadiens to the art on Rue Du Tresor, Alex Drobin soaks in the vibes of sophisticated yet playful Quebec.

programme.title: Backpack Eilat, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Ein Gedi oasis and Masada plateau and Dead Sea on her way to Eilat, where she visits the beaches, Red Canyon and Wadi Shani, Nimna National Park and experiences the nighlife.

programme.title: World Spas Chiva Som, Thailand
programme.desc: From an underwater therapy to a massage that detoxes internal organs, Jamie Srubis tries varied spa treatments at the Chiva Som resort in Thailand.

programme.title: XP Guide Oslo 1, Norway
programme.desc: Oslo is the oldest of the Scandinavian capitals with a rich history dating back to over 1000 years, the city's iconic monuments reveal its evolution through the ages to visitors. Elisha goes on a tour to see some of them such as the magnificent Arkeshus Castle, a medieval castle that was built to protect Oslo but was used instead as a prison, and Oslo City Hall, the administrative center of the city which hosts the annual Nobel peace prize ceremony.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Toronto, Canada
programme.desc: Alex Drobin gets to know the vibe of Toronto at significant spots such as Saint Lauren's Market and Sir Henry's Garage for Classic Cars.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Drill down on a dad's sheepdog love and meet two other adorable contenders.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Watch the vets treat an injured rescue pup and a guinea pig with a broken leg.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Cheer on an injured K-9 officer, test dog moves, and prep for a surprise bash.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Prep for a pup's leg surgery, inspect kitty ears, and check on a Seeing Eye dog.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Sort out canine tooth issues, a wriggly dog's heart, and broken-down kitty hips.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Monitor kitty kidney function, urgent stomach surgery, and cat-fight wounds.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope's busy season arrives early. Two patients from last year are released.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: A dark day descends on Hope for Wildlife. A rare owl appears ready for release – but will it fly?

programme.title: Queen Victoria's Letters: A Monarch Unveiled

programme.title: Catherine

programme.title: Royal Children: Prince William and Prince Harry

programme.title: Balkan Royals
programme.desc: The royal families are back in the Balkans. Once ousted by the communists, they now enjoy a high reputation again. Externally, they act as representatives of their states internally, as moral and neutral institutions.

programme.title: Princess Diana: Where Now?

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet finds himself in a series of predicaments as he resumes his experiments on Synthetic Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Knock Out and Starscream experiment with synthetic energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron doubts Predaking and his allegiance after Predaking reveals a secret of his own.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots capture Soundwave while Megatron decides to resurrect a former plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While Optimus faces off with Predaking, Megatron mounts a campaign to form a new alliance with Rachet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet finds himself in a series of predicaments as he resumes his experiments on Synthetic Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth hangs in the balance as the Autobots and Decepticons march toward their last stand.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 1
programme.desc: The heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 2
programme.desc: Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 3
programme.desc: The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: More Than Meets the Eye, Part 3
programme.desc: The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs At Sea: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: Smurfette's Gift
programme.desc: Every year, Smurfette snoops around to discover what her birthday presents will be before she receives them. But this year, Sassette has created the Keep-Smurfette's-Presents-a-Surprise-Committee. Nat has discovered a cave where they might be able to hide all the gifts prepared by the Smurfs. But what this cave also hides is a greedy imp who is not only interested in keeping Smurfette's gifts...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Magnifying Mixture: Brainy makes an enlarging potion that turns Hefty into human size. The big-little strong man captures Gargamel and brings him back to the Smurf Village where Papa Smurf magically causes Azrael to chase his master back to his dreary castle.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Once In A Blue Moon: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Dancing Shoes: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: Return To Don Smurfo
programme.desc: When a drop of Papa Smurf's new potion spills on the Smurflings' adventure book, the fictional hero springs to life. The dashing Don Smurfo, willing to rid the Smurf of the evil Gargamel, gallantly captures him...

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sweepy Smurf: Sweepy the chimney sweep Smurf is not the most popular inhabitant of the Village of the Smurfs. He is rather messy, and the clouds of soot that he makes certainly don't add to his popularity. Only the Smurflings find him great company as he's the only one who can get dirty and not be told off. Yet in their enthusiasm for Sweepy, the Smurflings endanger the Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfic Games: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: Dirty Dog
programme.desc: The toaster makes an extra piece of Tubby Toast – but who is going to eat it? The Teletubbies watch Emily And Jamie take their dog Jessie for a walk before giving her a bath.

programme.title: Dog Walking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children take their dog for a walk. A voice trumpet appears and barks like a dog. Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po laugh as they run all over Teletubbyland barking.

programme.title: Drawing Cacti
programme.desc: Po feels like having some Tubby Custard. The Teletubbies watch some children visiting a conservatory and drawing cacti. Tinky Winky goes for a walk. Five birds appear in Teletubbyland and the Teletubbies dance round the flowers.

programme.title: Dry Stone Wall
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go up the slide to see two children help mend a dry stone wall. A wall appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Po and Tinky Winky play a game with the wall. They hear Dipsy coming and hide behind the wall.

programme.title: Eid, New Clothes
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children try on their new clothes for the Eid festival. A mirror appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa and Dipsy love to look at their reflection, but when Tinky Winky wants to have a go, he's too tall.

programme.title: Emily & Jester
programme.desc: A chair appears in Teletubbyland and Laa-Laa has fun standing up and sitting down. The Teletubbies watch a little girl, Emily, riding her pony, Jester.

programme.title: Emily & Trap
programme.desc: Over the hills and far away, Po loves to ride her scooter fast and slow. The Teletubbies watch Emily ride in her trap, drawn by her pony Jester.

programme.title: Emily Washing Pony
programme.desc: Laa-Laa has fun wearing Dipsy's hat. The Teletubbies watch Emily washing her pony, Jester. The Teletubbies enjoy playing a game washing with their Tubby sponges.

programme.title: Feeding the Chickens
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance in and out of the trees. The Teletubbies watch Matthew, James and Mark feeding their chickens. There's toast all over Teletubbyland when the Tubby Toaster makes too much toast.

programme.title: Flamenco Guitar
programme.desc: The Tubbies laugh when laugh when they bump into each other and fall over. They all watch two girls meet Tito a Flamenco guitar player who plays them a nursery rhyme. A guitar appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Fungie the Dolphin

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: 1920s Vienna. Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship and adventure. On Christmas Eve, Mary's beloved Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll. Later that night, Mary's imagination brings the doll to life. Introducing himself as "NC," he takes her on a wondrous journey through a stunning dimension where toys assume human form and everything appears ten times larger. But danger lurks.

programme.title: Felix and the Hidden Treasure
programme.desc: Convinced that his father, who disappeared at sea two years ago, is still alive, 12-year-old Felix embarks on a search for him in the company of Old Tom, a retired fisherman Squawk, a thieving one-legged parrot and Rover, a cat who acts like a dog. Their journey takes them to Darkshadow Island, where a secret community inhabits an underground city, ruled by the megalomaniacal Morgäa, possessor of a priceless treasure.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: Pup Star is back and bigger than ever as the hit singing-pup competition show goes global! After achieving international stardom, Tiny the adorable Yorkie joins the celebrity judges for the first-ever Pup Star World Tour. The judges each welcome their favourite contestant from around the world to the Pup Star pack, training them to compete for the new title of global pup star champion. India's Raji joins Team Growl, China's Ming joins Team Paw-Paw, Nigeria's Mobo joins Team Gnarley, and Mexico's dashing telenovela star Julio joins Team Tiny.

programme.title: Pinocchio
programme.desc: Live-action adaptation of the beloved story of a wooden puppet who magically comes to life. Pinocchio longs for adventure and is easily led astray, encountering magical beasts and fantastical spectacles. However his dream is to become a real boy, which can only come true if he changes his ways.

programme.desc: Things don't go according to plan when the Rabbids start following a hitchhiker.

programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Cyboars - Across Space, An Even Bigger Threat is Found!: The Cyboars discover the Renegades were formed from the worst Bitron criminals as a team to take them down. Fleeing into space, the Cyboars use all the power left in their ship to warp away.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Cyboars - Time to Face The Unstoppable Android Stagorex: Bush Hog, Stampede and Airboar outwit the policeman and speed to Staghorn Island. Working together they're able to beat the Renegades and the android Stagorex to rescue Sparky.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates - The Exploding Hot Sauce: Furious that her hot sauce did not win first place at the county fair, Granny takes to a life of crime with a new exploding hot sauce.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates - Courageous Scaredy Cat Part 2: Kackle the clown and his army of monkeys are behind the toys going missing! Ryan and his mom must stop the clown in his tracks!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 221: Double Duel Part 1
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 223: Double Duel Part 3
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 224: Double Duel Part 4
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 225: The Rescue
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 226: Friends 'til the End Part 1
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 227: Friends 'til the End Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 228: Friends 'til the End Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 229: Friends 'til the End Part 4
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E20
programme.desc: The Egyptian leg of the World Championships culminates with the final match highlighting F Dynasty against the BBA Revolution. The day before the match, Tyson has Daichi practice moves with him that they're not usually accustomed to doing: namely, tag-team attacks.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E21
programme.desc: Tyson is feeling the pressure of being World Champion. Despite Hiro's warning, a television crew follows him around for a day, taping his every move. Daichi feels jealous and tries to compete for the camera's attention.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E24
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E25
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E26
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E27
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: Packed with incredible facts about the human body, Dr Chris and Dr Xand van Tulleken experiment and explore their way through the fascinating world of medicine and biology.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: We don't know where they came from. We don't know how they got here. But we do know this: they're here to play!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The brothers come across a lone baby elephant and bring him back to the Tortuga HQ for safety until they can find his mom. But they learn how mischievous baby elephants can be and get more than they bargained for when it almost destroys the Tortuga! As they rush to get the baby elephant home, the WildKratts team realizes that animals have different structures that serve various functions in growth and survival. And an elephant's trunk is like the multipurpose tool of "creature features" with hundreds of uses, including: showering, blasting water, grabbing, lifting, communicating, "hearing", pushing and pulling.

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: In this awesome episode of T-Rex Ranch, Park ranger Darren accidentally gets hit with a sleepy dart!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Welcome to dinosaur school where the park rangers are learning all about the different dinos when they hear that a trespasser has entered the park!
