programme.desc: A giant creature looms up out of the Thames in London! / Mirette and Jean-Patt meet the Queen of England for the first time. But the Queen and Jean-Pat are brainwashed and suddenly want to give away e

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Betty's Tomato Truck / Gus's Garbage Truck / Tony's Taxi Cab
programme.desc: When Betty's tomato truck hits a bump in the road, her truck becomes a tomato-y mess! So, she floors it to Carl's Car Wash where Carl goes through his three-point checklist and decides her tomato truck needs medium messy treatment. Betty pays five tokens and heads into the car wash. She leaves all tidied up! / Gus the Garbage Truck driver is doing a dumpster pickup when SPLAT, the trash lands all over his truck. What a stinky mess! Gus swings over to Carl's Car Wash, where Carl goes through his evaluation process and decides that Gus's truck a big garbage salad with a side of stink! So, Gus pays seven tokens and drives into the car wash. He rolls out sparkling clean. His truck never looked so good! / After Tony drops Ivan off, Fiona's Fire Truck zooms by and splashes mud all over Tony's Taxi! Tony needs to get cleaned up fast – time is money! After a quick vehicle evaluation, Tony counts 10 tokens and drops them into the machine deposit. He rolls into the car wash and gets his taxi all tidied up! Carl gives Tony a tip – to stay away from puddles. Tony drives away, one happy customer!

programme.title: Dino Ranch Shorts: Dino Ranchers Fly & more!
programme.desc: Nursery rhyme 'Dino Ranchers Fly', 'Dinosaur Dinosaur', Light Touch Tango', & 'Tangos Dancing Song' music videos from the hit TV show, Dino Ranch.

programme.title: Science Max: Earthquake-Proof
programme.desc: Phil tries to build a tower strong enough to not fall apart when shaken in a massive earthquake.

programme.title: Hero 108: The Rise of Lin Chung
programme.desc: During a time of great doubt, Lin Chung is reunited with his martial arts master. Now in spectral form, Tien Khuan gives Lin Chung three fighting tasks.

programme.title: Hero 108: The Rise of Lin Chung
programme.desc: Lin Chung's Harmonic Energy comes in handy when he's pitted against Hidden Kingdom's most powerful enemy. TwinMasters, a terrifying force of chaos incarnate, is a foe bent on bringing First Squad to i

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid: Climb, Ignatz, Climb!
programme.desc: Sid pretends that his stuffed animal panda is going on an adventure to the top of the playground slide. Sid and his friends make a plan and use simple machines like wheels, inclined planes, levers and pulleys to get the panda all the way to the top of the slide!

programme.desc: Welcome to Sing Along With Tobee! In this very first episode, Tobee and Caitie teach you a super simple hello song! Join them each episode as they sing and dance to classic nursery rhymes and kids songs. / Caitie and Tobee sing one of their favorite kids songs, One Little Finger. It's super simple and super fun. It's also great for learning new parts of the body vocabulary! / Tobee makes a card for his dad's birthday but he wants to give him something else. So Caitie teaches him Skidamarink, the perfect song to sing on a birthday, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, Mother's Day, or any other day you'd like to tell someone how special they are!

programme.desc: It's Halloween in Magic Tears World! The babies find a spell book and decide to cast one for the Booger Ghost to appear, but it doesn't seem to work. Although... what is that sticky thing on the floor

programme.desc: The Cow family prepares for New Year celebration and Granny's and Grandpa's arrival. / It's winter time. In their country house Boh and Zoh get a postcard from their Granny and Grandpa from the North Pole. Boh gets an idea to have an expedition to the North Pole. He gets ready for it – he exercises, runs cross country.

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Lonesome Lucas / I Can't See You
programme.desc: Lucas wakes up in the middle of the night. How long can a night alone last? / Lucas tries to beat Bodhi at Hide and Seek.

programme.desc: Exciting news! Beaver Boy is ready to cut down his first tree. Come one, come all! Don't forget your hard hats!

programme.desc: Groove thinks there can't be a better way of saying hello than giving his tail a good old wagga-wagga - but how do the Tiddlypeeps say hello?

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Sidewalk Art
programme.desc: While drawing with Chalk, Pinkalicious begins to tell her friends an epic story about Puddles the poodle and Splish-Splash the cat.

programme.title: Road Rangers: Ambulance Donna is Here / Frank-In-Style
programme.desc: Road Rangers are a group of super heroes comprising of five street vehicles a police car, fire truck, ambulance, tow truck and garbage truck that fight crime and strive hard to keep their city safe! Call Donna, the cutest cartoon ambulance, if you've hurt yourself and she will be there in a jiffy to save the day. Sing and dance along to this car cartoon song just about Donna! / Frank is back with this funny silly antics in trying to become something that he is not! Watch as he learns all about self-confidence and learning to love oneself as you are in this fun filled kids episode with his friends tractor, ambulance, car, bike, fire engine, monster truck, garbage truck, loader, excavator, dumper, digger, tow truck, crane, helicopter and more.

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Holy Water
programme.desc: A rural Irish village will never be the same again after a group of bachelors hijack a truck full of Viagra pills as part of a get-rich-quick scheme. With special ops on their case, the boys hide the loot down the Church's Holy Well... only for it to seep out into the town's water supply.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Josh (Ben Stiller) and Cornelia (Naomi Watts) are a happily married middle aged couple, who seem content with where their life is going. Josh is a film maker and Cornelia a producer. One day whilst teaching, Josh meets Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried), a free-spirited young couple, who are spontaneous and untethered. Before long Josh and Cornelia, throw aside friends their own age to trail after the young hipsters and begin to feel a zest for life and a youth they wish they once had.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and takes off without a trace. Leaving Mexico for Los Angeles to find the baby's mother, Valentin ends up finding a new home for himself and his newfound daughter. An unlikely father figure, Valentin raises Maggie for six years, while also establishing himself as one of Hollywood's top stuntmen to pay the bills, with Maggie hilariously acting as his on-set coach. But their unique and offbeat family is threatened when Maggie's mother shows up out of the blue, and Valentin realizes he's in danger of losing his daughter - and his best friend.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During an extradition to South Korea, a group of dangerous criminals unite to stage a coordinated escape attempt from their floating prison. As the jailbreak escalates into a bloody riot, the fugitives and their allies from the outside exact a brutal terror campaign against the special agents onboard the cargo ship. But the prisoners aren't the only ones waiting to rise from the darkness.

programme.title: The Dead Lands
programme.desc: After his tribe is slaughtered through an act of treachery, Hongi, a Maori chieftain's teenage son, must avenge his father's murder in order to bring peace and honour to the souls of his loved ones. Vastly outnumbered by a band of villains, Hongi's only hope is to pass through the feared and forbidden Dead Lands and forge an uneasy alliance with the mysterious Warrior, a ruthless fighter who has ruled the area for years.

programme.title: Horsemen of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Seven college kids take a shortcut on their way to a party and unfortunately end up in Wormwood, where the spirit of the Headless Horseman hunts them one by one.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people are thrown together during an elaborate bank heist where any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: Raptor Ranch
programme.desc: Fossil Ridge, once believed to be a cattle ranch is discovered to be a breeding ground for vicious prehistoric velociraptors. When the bloodthirsty dinosaurs escape, the townspeople must fight to survive the deadly raptors.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Complex
programme.desc: Nursing student Asuka has just moved into an apartment complex with her parents and younger brother. On the first night in her new room, she is awoken by a strange scratching sound coming from the apartment of her neighbor.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Nick's a lucky guy. Tonight, he'll be having dinner with Jill Goddard, the hottest actress on earth. She's promoting her latest movie and he's won the main prize in an online contest. Then he gets a call. Some guy named Chord explains that dinner has been cancelled. And it's Jill's fault: she's a high- maintenance diva, and everybody hates her guts. Chord says he can make up for it.

programme.title: World Nature Heritage
programme.desc: A journey to the home of magnificent bison herds and the oldest national park in the world

programme.title: No Letting Go
programme.desc: What would you do to save your child? A young teenager struggles with a debilitating mental illness as his mom risks everything to save him without losing the rest of her family.

programme.title: Letters To God
programme.desc: Tyler Doherty is an extraordinary eight-year-old boy. Surrounded by a loving family and community, and armed with the courage of his faith, he faces his daily battle against cancer with bravery and grace. To Tyler, God is a friend, a teacher and the ultimate pen pal-Tyler's prayers take the form of letters, which he composes and mails on a daily basis. The letters find their way into the hands of Brady McDaniels, a beleaguered postman standing at a crossroads in his life. At first, he is confused and conflicted over what to do with the letters. But the decision he ultimately makes becomes a testament to the quiet power of one boy's shining spirit and unshakable faith.

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: A Gift Horse
programme.desc: A grieving, young girl works on the local ranch owned by a business tycoon, when a new horse arrives and she takes the opportunity to regain her faith by training it to win.

programme.title: Bullwhip
programme.desc: In order to avoid the hangman's noose, a cowboy agrees to marry a beautiful but fiery redhead.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: Fighters from Ave Maria
programme.desc: Western spaghetti set in gold rush times in California, involving circus acrobats, outlaws and a gold mine.

programme.title: The Cry of the Black Wolves
programme.desc: Halfwit Indian Akaena promises a fictitious treasure to anyone who takes her down south where the sun always shines.

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: All She Wishes
programme.desc: When sardonic high school senior Sophie O'Dea inherits her neurotic grandmother's car, an old automobile named Star, she is told the car has magical powers.

programme.title: Hearts & Vines
programme.desc: A builder and decorator on a home renovation show end up quarantined during the holidays in the home they are renovating.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Thomas and Robin are ready to spend the rest of their lives together, and nothing will stop their wedding from happening. Not even overprotective feuding mothers and a mischievous teenage sister.

programme.title: Operation Overlord
programme.desc: A week before storming the beaches of Normandy, two US soldiers infiltrate an abandoned complex to rescue a prisoner of war from the Germans.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature. However, as her research brings them closer together, she discovers there's more to him than meets the eye. Will she choose the man she thought she loved or the real-life embodiment of her fictional hero?

programme.title: Pele: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: The amazing story of Pele's meteoric rise from the slums of Sao Paulo to World Cup victory.

programme.title: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle?

programme.title: The Naked Kiss
programme.desc: Kelly, a prostitute, traumatised by an experience, referred to as 'The Naked Kiss,' by psychiatrists, leaves her past, and finds solace in the town of Grantville. She meets Griff, the police captain of the town, with whom she spends a romantic afternoon. Kelly finds a job as a nurse in a hospital for handicapped children. The work helps her find her sensitive side in the caring and helping of her young patients. Kelly's path towards happiness is thrown amiss, when she witnesses a shocking event, which threatens not just her happiness, but her mental health as well.

programme.title: The North Star
programme.desc: A Ukrainian village must suddenly contend with the Nazi invasion of June 1941.

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: One of the most controversial movies of its time, The Outlaw features a sizzling performance by 22-year old Jane Russell. Director Howard Hughes delivers the thrilling tale of Doc Holiday and Billy the Kid and their feud over a fiery half-breed named Rio (Russell). The Outlaw has been beautifully restored, capturing the breathtaking cinematography of the legendary Greg Tolland (Citizen Kane), and is in color for the first time!

programme.title: The Phantom Father
programme.desc: American professor Robert Traum embarks on an adventurous and amusing journey through Bucovina to find Sami the projectionist, the only person alive that can tell him anything about his Romanian Jewish descent. His symbolic journey is filled with danger, the unknown and the surreal, but finally rewarded with a double love: on the one hand he finds romantic love, on the other the passion for old cinema, nomad, popular, naive and generous.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: 26 men are chosen to participate in the roles of guards and prisoners in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control.

programme.title: Rise Of The Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London's East End for years to come.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: By working through his past problems, Tom Warshaw, an American artist living in Paris, begins to discover his true self and returns home to reconcile with his family and friends. Starring: David Duchovny, Téa Leoni, Robin Williams

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Occupation Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi and Blade Runner 2049, Occupation Rainfall is a sci-fi action epic with an all star cast including Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, where survivors are fighting back in a desperate ground war, the resistance uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decisive end for mankind. With the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their new home, the race is on to save the planet. Occupation Rainfall Is an explosive sci-fi extravaganza that grips from start to thrilling finish.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Invasion Planet Earth
programme.desc: After the death of his young daughter, Tom Dunn is a broken man. When his wife falls pregnant again, he cannot believe their luck. However, his joy is short-lived, as, on the very same day, the people of Earth become plagued with terrifying visions of the end of the world. When a gigantic, all-consuming alien mothership appears in the sky and launches a ruthless attack on Earth's cities, chaos and destruction follow. Tom must find the strength and wisdom to save his wife and unborn child. However, first he must confront a shocking truth. A truth which threatens the key to the survival of the human race. The ultimate war for Planet Earth is about to begin...

programme.title: Lapsis
programme.desc: Your life belongs to the machine… Struggling to support himself and his brother, Ray takes up work in the gig economy, laying cable to connect mysterious floating cubes. His new job is strange and highly pressured but extremely lucrative. As time passes his job becomes automated and he finds himself racing to complete his tasks before the robot cablers sharing his route. With this added pressure and growing hostility from those on the trail with him, will Ray even make it through the day? Black Mirror meets Birdbox, Lapsis is an innovative, engagingly topical, darkly funny and breathlessly creative piece of sci-fi cinema.

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: It has been five years after Diana send a man to jail for the murder of her father and fiancee. Then he escapes from prison. He keeps her captive in her own home. Did Diana put an innocent man away?

programme.title: Mr. Write
programme.desc: When editor Dori meets her idol, romance novelist Michael, she's crushed to learn he doesn't really believe in true love. But with both of their careers on the line they are forced to work together to make his next book a success. As the project takes shape, Dori inspires Michael in a way that revives his faith in love and the two get a chance at their own happy ending.

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: The Beauty Of Love
programme.desc: Emma has a lifestyle website that she puts her heart and soul into called “Classically Emma”. But when her numbers start trending down, she thinks she might've found her fix in a partnership with an ambitious millennial named Jill who has her own dreams.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: A Prayer Before Dawn
programme.desc: An English boxer incarcerated in Thailand fights in Muay Thai tournaments to earn his freedom.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: Described as Donnie Darko meets Lost and from legendary production company Blumhouse. After the tragic death of his father, millennial Toby (Logan Miller: Escape Room) is begrudgingly enrolled in a program where he must spend time on a remote island. After meeting mysterious Madeleine (Kristine Froseth: The Society), Toby realises neither of them are safe and something bloodthirsty is lurking.

programme.title: The Siren
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents - a seductive, heart-wrenching story of passion and revenge of cursed star-crossed lovers, who will never let go. Tom rents a cabin on a secluded lake, marked by a local legend of a lovelorn spirit. He knows he has found his soulmate in the seemingly human Nina, who must repress her demonic instincts. Meanwhile, a man hunts the monster who killed his husband.

programme.title: Let Her Out
programme.desc: Spine-tingling, this breakout body horror pays homage to director David Cronenberg. Waking up in hospital, bike courier Helen has suffered a traumatic head injury. But when she begins experiencing dark visions, blackouts and a strange presence around her, she knows she is in danger. Dark, disturbing and perfectly eerie, this horror will make you jump out of your skin.

programme.title: Puppy Time
programme.desc: Get ready to fall in deep, deep puppy love as we follow a litter of adorable puppies as they play, nap, tumble, eat and play some more. Featuring the world's cutest and most loved and treasured breeds including Pugs, Labradors, Dachshunds and Pekingese - these furry pups will have you laughing, crying, swooning and barking for more as we watch them discover their new world. Pawsitively pawesome!

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Instructions Not Included is the heart-wrenching US box office sensation about an irresponsible playboy (Eugenio Derbez: Geostorm), who must grow up quickly after a former lover gives him their daughter to raise, then leaves without a trace. A unique and heart-warming comedy on life, love and friendship.

programme.title: A Call To Spy
programme.desc: To aid the war effort, Winston Churchill orders his new spy agency to recruit and train women for covert operations. Stars Stana Katic, Sarah Megan Thomas (2019)

programme.title: Escape Plan 2
programme.desc: Ray Breslin must return to the prison he escaped from after a member of his security team goes missing. Starring Sylvester Stallone and Dave Bautista (2018)

programme.title: Another Mother
programme.desc: Things turn deadly for a woman after she becomes engaged to a man with a 10-year-old daughter. Starring Alex McKenna (2020)

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her high standards. Her fiancé's sister begins to be suspicious of her actions. Starring Brittany Underwood (2017)

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Young influential New Yorker, Josh, hires Lindsey to photograph his sister's wedding. Will the romantic setting cause sparks to fly between Josh and Lindsey? (2020)

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony. Starring Andrew W Walker (2015)

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: Dr. Kate is a romance guru with a hit radio show. But when she is unexpectedly dumped by her fiancé during their engagement party, will someone come to the rescue and protect her dignity? (2016)

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: TV presenter Tiffany reluctantly gives divorcee Brooks a lifestyle makeover for her new show. Can Brooks's charm help raise the show's ratings, or will he raise Tiffany's heart instead? (2020)

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Young influential New Yorker, Josh, hires Lindsey to photograph his sister's wedding. Will the romantic setting cause sparks to fly between Josh and Lindsey? (2020)

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: In Isabelle's family, every first marriage has ended in divorce. To circumvent the family's curse Isabelle devises a plan marry and divorce a complete stranger before wedding her faultless fiancé Pierré. After her initial plan backfires she targets Jean-Yves, an adventurous yet quirky travel writer who she tries to manipulate with powers of seduction. A series of misadventures beset them as they take on Africa and then Moscow on a whirlwind succession, breaking Isabelle out of her comfortable routine existence. Despite her efforts to make him fall for her things don't go to plan and Isabelle experiences the rush of life on the edge.

programme.title: Centigrade
programme.desc: Centigrade is a high-intensity, high concept survival thriller based on chilling true events. A married couple find themselves trapped in their frozen vehicle after a blizzard and struggle to survive amid plunging temperatures and unforeseen obstacles. At -40 degrees your lungs freeze and time is running out…

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Golden Years
programme.desc: When Arthur and Martha Goode find that their pension pot is virtually worthless they decide to take drastic action - by robbing a bank! After their first robbery is successful they start to like the criminal lifestyle and so decide to rob even more, but as the banks get bigger and the robberies get riskier will they be able to outwit the police as they close in? In the vein of "Lady In the Van" and "The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel", Golden Years is a hilarious British heist thriller that shows just because you're getting old doesn't mean you have to stop having fun.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico
programme.desc: Returning from exile to avenge his slain family, the gun-slinging, guitar-toting "Desperado" dispenses justice the hard way.

programme.title: Mo Money
programme.desc: A young con artist tries to go straight by getting a job to be near a beautiful woman.

programme.title: 3 Ninjas Knuckle Up
programme.desc: Rocky, Colt and Tum Tum are back in an all new adventure everyone will fall for.

programme.title: Gumshoe
programme.desc: Story about a bingo-caller who, bored with his mundane existence, takes out a newspaper ad offering his services as a private detective.

programme.title: A Fine Mess
programme.desc: A slapstick action and goodtime comedy as an actor and a carhop go the races and get caught in a chase.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: North
programme.desc: A young boy convinces a judge to allow him to sever his familial ties. Once rid of his work-obsessed parents, North embarks on an international quest for the quintessential set of parents. To avoid life in an orphanage, North must choose one of the numerous couples who are eager to adopt him or else return to his real parents.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Bell, Book And Candle
programme.desc: A modern-day witch likes her neighbor but despises his fiancee, so she enchants him to love her instead... only to fall in love with him for real.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites. A Marine about to embark on his fourth tour of duty, Sam is a steadfast family man married to his high school sweetheart, the aptly named Grace, with whom he has two young daughters. Tommy, his charismatic younger brother, is a drifter just out of jail who's always gotten by on wit and charm.

programme.title: The Last Act
programme.desc: Oscar® winning director, Barry Levinson directs Oscar® winning actor Al Pacino and Greta Gerwig in THE LAST ACT from the screenplay by Buck Henry and Michal Zebede based on the novel The Humbling by Philip Roth. Simon Axler is a famed stage actor who becomes depressed and then suicidal when he suddenly and inexplicably loses his gift. In an attempt to get his mojo back, he has an affair with a lesbian woman half his age. Before long, the relationship causes chaos as people from the romantic duo's pasts resurface in their lives.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love. Oscar® winner Brie Larson brings Jeannette Walls's best-selling memoir to life as a young woman who, influenced by the joyfully wild nature of her deeply dysfunctional father (Woody Harrelson), found the fiery determination to carve out a successful life on her own terms.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A man (Richard Gere) returns from the Civil War claiming to be the cruel, wealthy Jack Sommersby. He explains away his drastic change in looks and personality as the result of spending six tortuous years in a prisoners' camp. His wife Laurel (Jody Foster), thinking he was dead all these years, is just about to remarry. She doubts that he is really Jack but their relationship is such an improvement over her pre-Civil War marriage that she allows him back into her life. Just as they settle in however, the sheriff arrests Jack for a murder committed many years previously.

programme.title: Mortal
programme.desc: Chronicle meets X-Men meets Thor Mortal is a fantasy adventure epic from the director of Troll Hunter and starring The Fault In Our Star's Nat Wolff. Based on ancient Norse Mythology, a young boy must discover the origins of his extraordinary powers before hell-bent authorities condemn him for an accidental murder. A breath-taking and thrilling origins adventure story about one boy's journey to uncover who, or what, he really is.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Daniel Magder features as Matthew, the nerdy new kid in town with a passion for boxing. The school bully, Hector, is the resident boxing champion, dominating all opponents who stand in his way. After witnessing a few run-ins between Matthew and Hector, former pro boxer, now school janitor Dan Barnes (Steve Austin) trains Matthew for the biggest challenge of his life. What follows is a Rocky-esque tale of a young boy who forces everyone to change their preconceived notions of who he is and what he's capable of.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Juggling some angry Russians, the British Mi5, his impossibly leggy wife and an international terrorist, debonair art dealer and part time rogue Charlie Mortdecai (Johnny Depp) must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks and special charm in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to a lost bank account filled with Nazi gold.

programme.title: Highway Cops

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Mistakes and mechanical issues start to wear down the northern and southern fleets. Kahuna tries to catch up after boat repairs that keep Captain Reed Meredith and his crew off the water. Reel E Bugging Captain Bobby Earl navigates one setback after another in order to extend a hard earned lead. Meanwhile, Pinwheel hopes to catch quickly in order to push ahead of the leading southern boats before the quota closes.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: When one last extension is added to the quota, the competition gets tighter than ever. Its a game of leapfrog on the leader board, as every boat races to secure their last few paychecks before the season closes. With big bluefin being caught, everyone knows the limit will be full in the blink of an eye, but the real question is whose catch will be enough to take the top spot?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: JudgAll season long the bluefin battle between Northern and Southern boats has raged and the final two days of the season will be no different. A championship title is on the line, along with final paychecks and local reputations. Southern boats are in the lead, but Northerners, Pinwheel and Hot Tuna will not stop their pursuit of the title and desire to topple the Southern fleet. In the end it all comes down to one final giant bluefin tuna.e Frank Caprio takes an empathetic approach to a variety of traffic, parking and other violations.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Opening day of winter bluefin tuna season in the Outer Banks. FV-Tuna.Com joins the Southern fleet for the first time. With the return of top-boats Fishin Frenzy, Reel E Bugging, Hot Tuna and Pinwheel everyone is fishing for success.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Captain Nick Gowitzka on Little Shell has long touted the greenstick as the secret to his success. But not everyone in the fleet believes its a necessary tool to catch giant bluefin down south and would rather rely on rod and reel. Meanwhile, Pinwheel is the only boat in the fleet yet to catch a fish this season. Their desperation swells as they fear they could quickly be falling too far behind to ever catch up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Will the greenstick continue to give the Little Shell an edge, or will his more traditional rod-and-reel rivals prove victorious in the long run ? Captains are trying various methods to try and come in at the top of the catch board.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Rasta Rocket needs some money to repair damage from a previous trip, and they are not the only crew with concerns. Fuel, bait and repair costs are mounting for the boats so no bluefin for the buyers means no money for the crews.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: In the Outer Banks, weather can change with very short notice, and the captains must choose between fight or flight when harsh conditions pummel the fleet. Those that brave it experience hard fishing and even some boat damage.

programme.title: WaterBear
programme.desc: Explore some of the best WaterBear Originals! Featuring "In Death Is Life", "Mother of the Sea", "Tide to Nature", " Extract. Destroy. Repeat", "A Lens on the World", and "Behind the Screens".

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In A 'Tale Of Two Sharks' we take a look at the incredible array of sharks found off the South African coast, focusing on the endangered Scalloped Hammerhead and the iconic Great White.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: The crocodile is king of the wetland a tone of cold blooded monster with the most terrifying bite force on Earth. The product of a 100 million year ancestry, the 25 species around today are testament to the crocodile's supreme intelligence and adaptability.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Programming will resume at 6am
programme.desc: Programming will resume at 6am

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: We love our coasts, and so do animals! The corridor of water where the open ocean transitions into coastal habitat is known as the surf zone. The churning forces of the waves clashing with the land make these some of the most food-rich waters on Earth.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: To us the beach is one giant playground, but for wildlife it's a place to live, to find food and to raise their young. Amongst the fish and chips, sandcastles and donkey rides it's easy to forget that beaches are vital habitats, home to a myriad of animals.

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The river that swallows all rivers - this is what the natives call it. In reality, the Congo, when considering its water masses, is the second largest and the deepest river in the world. At its source in the north of Zambia, it starts out as a mere trickle, but on its journey westwards it grows and grows, becoming ever mightier and with it, the animals, too: the shoebill stork hides in the dense papyrus. Metre-long pythons hunt for their prey in trees and huge hippos fight for power and respect in the water. To survive in the Congo, animals have to adapt to extreme conditions. Here, evolution has spawned unique creatures: fish with lungs, wings and those that go hunting on land. The Congo River feeds the second largest rainforest on earth. Here is the home of the forest elephant. Time and again, they are summoned to this one, magic place: the Dzanga Bay. Countless other forest dwellers join them. What makes this place so special?

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The Congo, mighty and deep like no other river - yet still a retreat and a habitat for several of our world's strangest animals. Our closest relatives live deep inside the dense jungles: three of the four giant ape species have made the Congo basin their home. Rich in extraordinary footage, the second episode of "Myths of the Congo" also presents exciting insights into one of the most mysterious and dangerous regions on earth.

programme.title: The Moor
programme.desc: Moors and peatlands are oases in the cultivated landscape of Central Europe.

programme.title: Treasure of Lima
programme.desc: This is a story about a remote island in the pacific.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: We find out about the sweetest and most poignant animal baby stories. Whether on land, under water or in the sky - all of the babies in this series will conquer the hearts of all those watching. We accompany the adventures of the animal babies - lovingly cared for and brought up by their keepers. In the most gripping and informative way, both young and old will discover everything there is to know about Hamburg Zoo's toddlers.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Wildlife-Hospital Healesville: A thrilling day at the Australian Wildlife Health Centre for veterinarian Kelly O'Sulivan and her assistant Guni Hudson: An Australian Hedgehog was hit by a car and is badly injured. Kelly fights for the life of an Opossum. And Anya, a baby wallaby, makes her first exciting public appearance at the centre. Elephant Malaika: We spend the day with handler Joseph and the 4-yr. old Elephant Malaika. Jospeh has known Malaika since she was a few weeks old. How will she do with the children on her first visit to a public school?

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Dolphin Joan: Dolphin Joan is the darling of visitors to the “Loro Parque” and will face the challenge of his first live show in front of an audience. His trainer Miguel Luis Sosa is going through the final training lessons with him. Will this quick learner be able to perform with the help of his mother and grandmother? Vervet Monkey Alfie: Silke von Eynern is runs the “Bambelela Farm” in South Africa, where she has taken care of vervet monkeys for many years. Her newest arrival is Alfie, a vervet monkey that has been kept as a pet and been treated all wrong. Silke is on a mission to teach 10 weeks old Alfie how to be a proper monkey. Wildlife Foundlings: It's high season at the wild animal station Sachsenhagen. Mareen Möller takes care of all sorts of foundlings and injured orphans -- she has her hands full all day. Especially a baby fox named Didi and a wild boar baby named Armin require all her attention as they are growing tall and bold.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Tree-Kangaroo Dorothy: Margit Cianelli is a trained animal carer who lives at the Lumholtz Lodge in the Australian tablelands and is currently taking care of small tree kangaroo named Dorothy. Dorothy is old and strong enough to go into the forest by herself now. Margit gets nervous, when Dorothy does not return before dusk. Luckily she is wearing a tracking device… Warthog Baby: Nelly is a 5 week old Warthog that lives in the Kragga Kamma Game Park in South Africa. Her nanny Heike Zitzer is trying to wean Nelly from her care, but the little warthog just loves being by her side. When Heike leaves her alone, Nelly meets grumpy fellows as she searches for Heike throughout the park. Will Nelly make new friends in the end?

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies
programme.desc: Arctic Wolves: A pack of 5 week old wolf cubs get ready to go to school with famous film animal trainer Joe Bodemann. But before that, the little cubs have to be weaned off their bottles and get used to their new outdoor enclosure. Wildlife Warriors: These special nannies are always ready to jump into action to save animals of every kind. Over 100 patients are being treated by this Australian wildlife hospital every day: tortoises, kookaburras, wild boars, possums, hedgehogs - and even poisonous snakes! Lion Amir: In South Africa, 11 month old lion Amir was brought to his nanny Katja Peters half starved. Now he's maturing into a beautiful lion and is looking for company. Will he find true love with a very special lioness?

programme.title: Wild Moments: Wild Moments: Dangerous & Deadly II
programme.desc: Whenever humans enter the wilderness – no matter if they are scientists, cameramen or just outdoor fans – they will face unforgettable encounters: the discovery of new species in the jungles of New Guinea, the scary moments when a group of white sharks surround a diving team off the coast of South Africa and the dedicated work of wildlife warriors who try to save jaguars and gorillas to name a few. Wildlife film makers sometimes risk life and limb too. In Siberia Uwe Anders is taken by surprise by an uninvited guest – a polar bear. Wildlife film makers experience also many emotionally touching moments: Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg are witnessing a wolf approaching a lone newborn bison. But just in time its mother arrives. The ten part series shows the funniest but also the most dangerous and the most emotional moments in the wild.

programme.desc: It's a tense meeting between Albert the sheep and his buddy Themba the elephant, as Themba doesn't recognize him with his new haircut. The fur is flying as the white lion cubs meet their new foster parents.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: There are tears of joy as two lions rescued from a circus in France take their first steps back on African soil. It's high-flying action as the game capture team brings in Africa's national emblem the springbok – these tiny antelopes can really jump.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: Keeping track of the world's biggest animal is harder than you think. Up at the animal hospital two feisty young caracals check in and we almost lose our very precious sheep Albert after he gets stuck down with a deadly tick disease.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: The wildlife team end up with a black rhino hot on their tail when the animal wakes up suddenly after being ear notched. It's the battle for the burrow up at the animal hospital as the orphaned warthogs take on a puppy for ownership of the hole.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: The wildlife team almost ends up in the jaws of a hippo after they try and help an injured bull. We capture some rare footage of the cheetah cubs as their mother teaches them to hunt by using a baby antelope as bait.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: Taking care of one's children is the most marvellous job around. It's also the hardest job in the world. There are times when you can almost understand that some animals don't take care of their offspring at all.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: The tranquillity of Nature is just a façade. Living means struggling and fighting. It means winning and losing many battles, both big and small. This struggle affects everyone and everything: fights over food, over territory… or for love.

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: During their lives, animals spend tons of time taking care of their personal appearance. They scratch, lick, powder themselves, or comb their feathers and take baths for hours, every day. These are the animals 'Dressing for Life'.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: Many species arrive on islands by mistake. It can place these animals in a land of opportunity, but it can also become a prison. Space, food and water are limited resources, and so island creatures evolve to make the most of their surroundings.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We've got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They're going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other's strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let's find out!

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world's strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we'll find out.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We're in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn't been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.
